facebook.content:
"For the kingdom of God is not a matter of eating and drinking, but of righteousness, peace, and joy in the Holy Spirit." - Romans 14:17

In a world obsessed with material wealth and fleeting pleasure, this verse reminds us that true fulfillment lies in living a life that honors God's kingdom. What does it mean to live with a priority on righteousness, peace, and joy in the Holy Spirit, above the world's standards of success?

instagram.content:
"All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me. Go therefore and make disciples of all nations...Matthew 28:18-20

As we navigate complex systems and societal expectations, remember: Jesus has ultimate authority, not the world's systems. Our obedience to Him reorders our priorities and gives us Kingdom perspective.

tiktok.content:
"But you shall receive power when the Holy Spirit has come upon you; and you shall be witnesses to Me in Jerusalem, in all Judea and Samaria, and to the end of the earth." - Acts 1:8

This verse isn't about waiting for a distant event - it's about being empowered to live out your calling NOW.
